steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The grammatical key is determining the subject: “lost works,” a plural noun. The intervening descriptive phrase and parenthetical don't change the subject.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: ”Have become” is plural and correctly matches “lost works.” Choices B, C, and D are singular forms (“is becoming,” “has become,” “becomes”), which violate subject-verb agreement with a plural subject. That matches choice A — A is correct.
